properties.httpRequestBody:
{
    "subject": "Llamada entrante de: {{NewPhoneContact.ANI}}",
    "description": "Llamada atendida por el agente. Cliente: {{Nombre}} ",
    "phonenumber": "{{NewPhoneContact.ANI}}",
"cjp_aniphonenumber": "{{NewPhoneContact.ANI}}",
  "cjp_dnis": "{{NewPhoneContact.DNIS}}",
"cjp_queuename": "{{queue}}",
    "directioncode": true,
    "statecode": 0,
    "statuscode": 1,
    "regardingobjectid_contact@odata.bind": "/contacts({{CustomerID}})"
}
properties.httpContentType_name:name: None
